symptom: a strong suspicion they had swallowed something after a search turned up nothing
hook: a thin flat rectangle of metal was lying inside the stomach
whatYouSee: A thin rectangular metal blade sitting flat inside the stomach.
whyItMatters: A flat object like this can sit safely in the stomach for a while but its sharp edges make it far riskier than a round object once it starts to move.
treatment: A sharp object like this comes out by urgent endoscopy before it can move on and cut the gut.
takeaway: Some objects are dangerous simply because of their shape.

generated.threadsCaption:
A patient came in with a strong suspicion they had swallowed something after a search turned up nothing.

Then the X-ray loaded 😭

And a thin flat rectangle of metal was lying inside the stomach.

Case #90 🩻 Difficulty 2/5

Medics: your diagnosis?

Everyone else: What everyday object hides this well in a pocket?

Answer in 45 min 👀 no spoilers from me till then
generated.threadsAnswer:
Answer: Swallowed razor blade

👀 What you see:
A thin rectangular metal blade sitting flat inside the stomach.

🦴 Why it matters:
A flat object like this can sit safely in the stomach for a while but its sharp edges make it far riskier than a round object once it starts to move.

💊 Treatment:

A sharp object like this comes out by urgent endoscopy before it can move on and cut the gut.

seedHint: Look at how thin and flat it is and ask yourself where you keep one of these
